TIAMAT-CHAOS_TIDE.title: Chaos Tide
TIAMAT-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
TIAMAT-SPAWN_LAHMU.title: Spawn Laḫmu
TIAMAT-BLACK_MUD.title: Black Mud
TIAMAT-BLACK_MUD.description: #Apply !Curse! Curse to an enemy. Gain !Nurture! Nurture.
TIAMAT-SUCKLE.title: Suckle
TIAMAT-SUCKLE.description: #Gain !Nurture! Nurture. If you have 3 or more Laḫmu, draw 1 card.
TIAMAT-MITOSIS.title: Mitosis
TIAMAT-MITOSIS.description: #Devour 1 Laḫmu: deal !D! damage, plus !PerNurture! for each Nurture. Then spawn 1 Laḫmu.
TIAMAT-BLACK_DELUGE.title: Black Deluge
TIAMAT-BLACK_DELUGE.description: #Apply !Curse! Curse to ALL enemies. Gain !Nurture! Nurture for each enemy cursed.
TIAMAT-ELEVEN_BEL_LAHMU.title: Eleven Bel Laḫmu
TIAMAT-ELEVEN_BEL_LAHMU.description: #Spawn up to !Lahmu! Laḫmu. Gain Nurture equal to your Laḫmu in play. Gain !NpCharge! NP Charge.
TIAMAT-BROKEN_HORN.title: Broken Horn
TIAMAT-BROKEN_HORN.description: #Devour ALL your Laḫmu. For each one devoured, deal !PerHorn! damage to ALL enemies, increased by !PerNurture! per Nurture. Gain !NpPerLahmu! NP Charge per Laḫmu.
TIAMAT-ENUMA_ELIS.title: Enūma Eliš
TIAMAT-ENUMA_ELIS.description: #Playable at !ChargeCost! NP Charge. Consume ALL NP Charge, refill your Laḫmu, then deal !D! damage to ALL enemies plus !PerLahmu! per Laḫmu, increased by !PerNurture! per Nurture and !PerTen! per 10 NP over !ChargeCost!.
